title: SALES — Zero Motion to First Booking
tagline: Your #1 venture got 1 of 59 commits this month. ~50 min to a live funnel and the path to booking #1.
fin_text: The funnel is live. Now it's reps: money block daily, bookings weekly.

levels.title: LEVEL 0 · THE MIRROR
levels.html:
The audit, no anesthesia

ventures.md calls sellsellingai "💰 the money maker. Top priority." The last 30 days: SSA got 2% of effort. Its goal line still literally reads "(define: more demos? bookings?)". BYB has a beautiful live site with no booking link — a store with no till.

Why — and why it's fixable in a week

Games are shippable and visible; sales feels abstract and exposed. But sales is NOT abstract — it's four concrete parts: someone specific (ICP) → one offer → one click (booking) → one follow-up (email). Each part is an hour of work you've already half-drafted. This course just makes you finish the wiring.

quiz.q: What is a beautiful live site with no booking link?
quiz.ex: Traffic with no capture is rented attention, returned at the end of the visit. The till comes BEFORE more marketing — always.

mission.txt: Say the quiet number out loud: write in the nucleus what SSA earned in the last 30 days. (It's ₪0. That's the baseline we beat.)

levels.title: LEVEL 1 · ICP — who is it FOR
levels.html:
The undefined ventures default to nothing

4 of 6 ventures have "(define:)" markers. Without a named buyer, the standup can't make a sales task concrete, so it schedules a game task instead. The empty ICP line is the root of the priority inversion.

The one-line ICP formula

[Specific person] who [painful situation] and will pay [price] for [outcome this week].
SSA candidate: "Freelancers/agency owners selling AI services who freeze on sales calls, ₪X for the system that books their next 3 clients." BYB candidate: "SMB owner who knows they need AI but not where to start, paying for a built bot + audit." Don't perfect them — write them. Wrong ICPs get corrected by calls; empty ICPs get corrected by nothing.

quiz.q: What does an undefined ICP cause at standup time?
opts: Sales tasks stay abstract, so shippable game tasks win the slot every time
quiz.ex: That's the audit's mechanism for the 52%-vs-2% inversion: 'what should I work on' needs a WHO before it can produce a concrete sales action.

mission.txt: Dictate one-line ICPs for SSA and BYB to Claude right now — they go into ventures.md and every '(define:)' dies. Wrong is fine; empty is not.

levels.title: LEVEL 2 · THE TILL — one booking link
levels.html:
The single highest-leverage hour in your portfolio

One Calendly (or Cal.com — free) link. One button on the BYB site: "Book a free 15-min AI audit." Claude wires the button the moment you paste the link. From that second, every visitor is a potential booking, and your funnel has a number instead of a feeling.

One metric to rule the venture

The audit's prescription: 1 booking in 30 days. Not revenue, not followers — one stranger picking a time slot. That single event validates the ICP, the offer, AND the channel at once. Everything else in SSA/BYB exists to make that number go up.

quiz.q: Why is 'bookings' the right first metric (not revenue or followers)?
opts: One booking validates ICP + offer + channel simultaneously
quiz.ex: A booking is a stranger trading their time for your offer — the smallest complete proof the funnel works end to end. Revenue follows reps of that.

mission.txt: Create the free Calendly/Cal.com, paste the link to Claude → booking button live on BYB today. The till is open.

levels.title: LEVEL 3 · THE FOLLOW-UP — ship the drafts
levels.html:
You already wrote the hard part

challenge-emails.md exists. ssa-week-1.md has a 5-day launch flywheel fully scripted (Mon confession → Fri offer). Drafted ≠ done — sent = done, your own rule. The remaining work isn't writing; it's picking a date and pressing send.

Sequence mechanics, minimum viable

  • Pick the audience seed: your existing contacts/groups — warm beats cold for launch #1.
  • Day-stamp the 5-day flywheel onto a real calendar week.
  • Every email ends with the booking link from Level 2. The funnel closes the loop: content → email → booking.

quiz.q: What's actually left on the email sequence?
opts: Pick a date and send — the drafts exist
quiz.ex: The audit found the flywheel fully scripted and 10 days idle. The blocker is a calendar decision, not a writing task. CRM comes after there's a pipeline to manage.

mission.txt: Pick the launch week NOW and tell Claude — the 5-day flywheel gets day-stamped onto the content board with the booking link wired into every email.

levels.title: LEVEL 4 · PROTECT THE MONEY BLOCK + BOSS
levels.html:
The structural fix for the inversion

The Money Block: 30 minutes, every morning, BEFORE anything Miklat. Standup names exactly one sales action (today's email, today's post, today's follow-up). Miklat is the reward for finishing it, not the alternative to starting it. This is the 2-box rule with teeth: money-maker eats first.

Delegation is the escape hatch

You built ssa-ceo, ssa-mktg, ssa-research and never staffed them. Research, drafts, and atomizing go to agents (the Automation course's loop); only the human moments — recording, sending, calls — stay yours. Your 30 minutes is the human 30 minutes.

boss.q: The first sales metric for SSA/BYB:

opts: Abstract sales tasks that always lose to shippable game tasks
30 min of sales BEFORE anything Miklat, daily

boss.q: What's left on the email flywheel?
opts: A date and a send button

mission.txt: Declare the Money Block to Claude — it becomes a standing first item in every standup. Tomorrow morning: 30 sales minutes before a single line of game code.
